prompt: I have a Django REST API project with postgres. I want to validate that the migrations are applied and the /api/posts/ endpoint returns real data, not a mock. What do I check? I'm concerned the DB might have migration errors.
expected_output: Guide user through: (1) python manage.py check, (2) python manage.py showmigrations to spot [ ] unapplied, (3) python manage.py migrate to apply, (4) curl -s http://localhost:8000/api/posts/ to verify non-empty response. Emphasize checking the actual postgres, not in-memory test DB.
